title: Introducing the Machine Payments Protocol
quote: Stripe says MPP is an open standard for agents to coordinate payments programmatically.

title: MPP — Machine Payments Protocol
quote: mpp.dev describes MPP as the open protocol for machine-to-machine payments.

title: MPP llms.txt
quote: The index lists HTTP 402, SDKs, MCP transport, multiple payment methods, sessions, and streaming guides.

title: The Payment HTTP Authentication Scheme
quote: The draft defines a Payment HTTP authentication scheme using HTTP 402 and payment-method identifiers.

title: Stripe charge Intent for HTTP Payment Authentication
quote: The Stripe charge draft defines one-time payments using Stripe Payment Tokens under Payment HTTP Auth.

title: Tempo charge Intent for HTTP Payment Authentication
quote: The Tempo charge draft defines required fields including amount, currency, and recipient for TIP-20 transfers.

title: Tempo Session Intent for HTTP Payment Authentication
quote: The session intent uses on-chain escrow and off-chain vouchers for high-frequency streaming payments.

title: Payment Authentication Scheme: JSON-RPC & MCP Transport
quote: The MCP transport draft maps payment credentials and receipts into JSON-RPC and MCP metadata.

title: Service Discovery for HTTP Payment Authentication
quote: The discovery draft covers advertising payment requirements through OpenAPI-style documents.

title: Machine payments
quote: Stripe says machine payments let agents pay programmatically for API calls or services.

title: MPP payments
quote: Stripe documents crypto and SPT payment methods for MPP, including Tempo and Stripe rails.

title: MPP quickstart
quote: The quickstart builds endpoints accepting both Tempo crypto payments and SPT payments.

title: The blockchain for payments at scale
quote: Tempo positions itself as a purpose-built Layer 1 for high-throughput, low-cost payments.

title: Tempo documentation
quote: Tempo docs describe it as a general-purpose blockchain optimized for payments and agentic payments.

title: Tempo Protocol
quote: Tempo protocol docs list payment-focused components including TIP-20, fees, payment lanes, and Tempo Transactions.

title: Tempo GitHub organization
quote: Tempo's GitHub describes the chain as designed specifically for stablecoin payments.

title: Visa introduces card specification and SDK for Machine Payments Protocol
quote: Visa says it is extending MPP to support card-based payments on its global network.

title: Stripe-backed crypto startup Tempo releases AI payments protocol, launches blockchain
quote: Fortune reported that Tempo and Stripe launched MPP alongside Tempo's blockchain mainnet.

title: MPP Payments
quote: Quicknode describes MPP as pay-per-request access to blockchain endpoints, currently in alpha.

title: Machine Payments Protocol (MPP)
quote: Privy says server wallets provide signing while mppx handles the 402 payment flow.

title: MPP on Stellar
quote: Stellar docs describe MPP as programmatic per-request payments over HTTP for AI agents and APIs.

title: Stripe builds out the economic infrastructure for AI with 288 launches
quote: Stripe introduced streaming payments combining Metronome tracking with stablecoin micropayments on Tempo.

title: Stripe launches Agentic Commerce Suite
quote: Stripe launched Agentic Commerce Suite for businesses to sell through AI agents.

title: Stripe and OpenAI introduce Instant Checkout in ChatGPT
quote: Stripe and OpenAI built the Agentic Commerce Protocol for Instant Checkout in ChatGPT.

title: Agentic commerce
quote: Stripe frames agentic commerce as helping AI agents search, recommend, and complete purchases.

title: Welcome to x402
quote: Coinbase describes x402 as automatic stablecoin payments directly over HTTP.

title: x402 - Payment Required
quote: x402.org positions x402 as an open standard for internet-native payments and agentic payments.

title: Powering AI commerce with the new Agent Payments Protocol (AP2)
quote: Google says AP2 is an open protocol for securely initiating agent-led payments across platforms.

title: Mastercard unveils Agent Pay
quote: Mastercard Agent Pay introduces agentic tokens built on tokenization capabilities for trusted AI commerce.

title: PayPal and OpenAI team up to power Instant Checkout in ChatGPT
quote: PayPal said it would power Instant Checkout in ChatGPT for PayPal wallet users and merchants.

title: SoK: Security of Autonomous LLM Agents in Agentic Commerce
quote: The paper says protocols including MPP enable agentic commerce but create new security attack surfaces.

title: Zero-Trust Runtime Verification for Agentic Payment Protocols
quote: The paper identifies replay and context-binding gaps in agent payment protocol runtimes.

title: How Agentic AI Will Reshape Payments
quote: The IMF frames agentic payments as early experimentation affecting authorization, settlement, compliance, and resilience.
